历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2022 to 2025, the minimum ranking for science (physics category) was approximately 6263 → 5112 → 5444 → 5270. Over the past 4 years, the ranking fluctuated within the 5100–6300 range. The 2025 baseline is about 5270, with a slight upward trend in recent 2 years. The provincial science enrollment plan was 95 in 2022, 96 in 2023, 97 in 2024, and 90 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 98, an expansion of about 8.9% compared to 2025, which alleviates competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class; ranked 32nd in the 2026 Soft Science main ranking, stable in the 25–32 range in recent years, belonging to top domestic engineering strong schools. The 2026 reputation evaluation is clearly negative, mainly due to campus voyeurism incidents attracting public attention, which may suppress application enthusiasm. Douyin popularity ranking is 87th, with average evaluation and low short video exposure. Light Industry Technology and Engineering A+, Chemical Engineering and Technology A, Materials Science and Engineering A, Environmental Science and Engineering A, Food Science and Engineering A, Architecture A-, Control Science and Engineering A-, Mechanical Engineering A-, Management Science and Engineering A-, a total of 9 A- and above disciplines, with outstanding engineering strength.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Computer, Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering and Automation and other advantageous majors of SCUT continue to be highly recommended. In 2026, the total number of regular college entrance examination candidates in this province is about 535,000. Estimated by recent years' proportion, physics category candidates are about 329,000, an increase of about 15.5% compared to 285,000 in 2025, significantly intensifying competition. South China University of Technology is located in Guangzhou, Guangdong, not a local university, with no local enrollment preference. Its enrollment proportion in Sichuan is about 2.3% (2025), which is at a medium level among out-of-province enrollments.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the 2025 baseline ranking of 5270, the 2026 expansion of about 8.9% (alleviating competition), the increase of physics category candidates in this province by about 15.5% (intensifying competition), negative reputation events (suppressing enthusiasm), and the sustained appeal of advantageous disciplines, a small correction is made considering the significant increase in candidates and reputation impact. The predicted 2026 minimum ranking is about 5501, with a range of 5001–6001.
